query:
SELECT 
  'Duplicate island names' as issue_type,
  COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT name) as count
FROM island_guides
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty/NULL slug',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE slug IS NULL OR slug = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty/NULL atoll',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE atoll IS NULL OR atoll = ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Empty Things to Do',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE topThingsToDo IS NULL OR topThingsToDo = '' OR topThingsToDo = '[]'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Missing coordinates',
  COUNT(*)
FROM island_guides 
WHERE latitude IS NULL OR longitude IS NULL
